notice: v0.30 source registry. Treasury, CFTC COT, EIA, USDA/NASS, BLS, BEA, Federal Reserve/FRED, Census, and credit/financial stress lanes are live/workflow-ready.

sources.name: U.S. Treasury official data
sources.attribution_note: Attribute U.S. Treasury / Fiscal Data where used.
sources.production_note: Treasury official Daily Treasury Par Yield Curve Rates lane is live. Rates are percentages, not prices.

sources.name: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics public data/API
sources.attribution_note: Attribute BLS and retrieval date where used.
sources.production_note: v0.24 adds BLS inflation/labor lane using published public BLS API series for CPI, core CPI, PPI, unemployment, payrolls, and wages. No API key is required at current request size; cite BLS and do not imply endorsement.

sources.name: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis public data/API
sources.production_note: v0.27 adds BEA NIPA macro lane using a BEA_API_KEY GitHub secret. Missing optional observations are recorded in audit output and not faked.

sources.name: CFTC Commitments of Traders public reports
sources.attribution_note: Attribute CFTC COT reports where used.
sources.production_note: CFTC COT lane is live. Interpretation separates spec direction, weekly change, crowding risk, commercial/hedger context, and conflict.

sources.name: U.S. Energy Information Administration open data/API
sources.production_note: v0.23 adds EIA energy fundamentals. Petroleum APIv2 calls require a free EIA_API_KEY GitHub secret. Natural gas storage uses EIA information release JSON. Use EIA attribution and do not imply endorsement.

sources.name: USDA National Agricultural Statistics Service Quick Stats API
sources.attribution_note: Attribute USDA/NASS Quick Stats where used; do not imply USDA endorsement.
sources.production_note: v0.23 adds USDA/NASS Quick Stats lane for crop condition, progress, and production. WASDE ending stocks, stock/use, and export sales are future sub-lanes.

sources.name: NOAA/NWS public weather lane
sources.production_note: Keep weather context simple at first; avoid paid model data.

sources.name: Federal Reserve / FRED selected public data
sources.public_access: public FRED graph CSV endpoints / Federal Reserve source series
sources.attribution_note: Attribute Federal Reserve, New York Fed, FRED / Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis where used.
sources.production_note: v0.28 adds Federal Reserve/FRED selected policy/liquidity lane using public FRED CSV endpoints. No API key required in v0.28.

sources.name: U.S. Census Bureau public data/API
sources.production_note: Use for public growth/consumer/trade context after higher-priority lanes.

sources.name: Federal Reserve / FRED credit-spread and financial-stress data
sources.public_access: public FRED graph CSV endpoints / Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis hosted public series
sources.attribution_note: Attribute FRED / Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis and underlying source where used.
sources.production_note: v0.30 adds a credit and financial-stress lane using public FRED CSV/text endpoints for HY OAS, IG OAS, BBB OAS, NFCI, ANFCI, and STLFSI4. No API key required.
